summary: Decent mixed‑source recording with an energetic second set, but not a standout performance
review: The tape combines a soundboard first set with a fairly decent audience capture of the second set. Reviewers note that the band was having fun—especially with newcomer Brent on keys—but the show lacks the depth and stretch to earn a top rating, and the recording quality is good but not exceptional.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 3‑star ratings; they describe an enjoyable but ordinary show with decent (though mixed) recording quality, leading to a modest overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Set 1 is soundboard derived, Set 2 sounds like a decent audience recording; overall clear enough but not high‑fidelity enough for a five‑star rating.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as energetic and well‑played, especially with Brent’s fresh energy; first set solid but no particular highlights noted.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent is only day 15 playing live with the band; reviewers highlight his enthusiastic contribution to the second set.
